$comment: Registry of all pipeline step types with their config schemas. Use this to build a dynamic pipeline editor in React.

step_types.label: Start Service
step_types.description: Start an infrastructure service (Neo4j, OTel collector, etc.) before the benchmark loop.

service.description: Service name declared in the infra bundle (e.g. neo4j, otel-collector)

health_timeout.description: Seconds to wait for the service health check to pass
